title: Coherence Times: T1, T2, and Decoherence Mechanisms
description: Master the fundamental concepts of qubit coherence - T1 (energy relaxation), T2 (dephasing), and T2* (inhomogeneous dephasing). Learn about the physical mechanisms that limit coherence and strategies to improve it.
learningObjectives: Distinguish between T1, T2, and T2* coherence times
Explain the physical mechanisms causing energy relaxation (T1 processes)
Understand pure dephasing and its relationship to noise spectral density
Calculate coherence times from noise spectra using Fermi's Golden Rule
Analyze the relationship T2 <= 2*T1 and its implications
